articles.title: Only 3 People on Earth Have This Brand-New Blood Type!
articles.summary: Doctors in Thailand found a blood type so rare, only three people are known to have it. It's called B(A)—mostly B, but with a tiny bit of A hiding inside. Could there be a fourth person?

articles.title: A 2,000-Year-Old Fingerprint Found on a Sunken Ship—Could It Solve an Ancient Mystery?
articles.summary: A tiny fingerprint pressed into sticky black tar on a 2,000-year-old boat might finally tell us who attacked a Danish island long ago. Scientists found it on Scandinavia's oldest plank boat!

articles.title: Could Time Flow Fast AND Slow at the Same Time? Scientists Are About to Find Out!
articles.summary: Time might be able to go fast and slow all at once—like a weird quantum magic trick. Scientists are using super-precise atomic clocks to test this mind-bending idea.
